final:
module top_module (
        input x,
        input y,
        input z,
        output w);assign w = ( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z ) |
           ( x & y & ~z ) ;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      w <= 1'b0; if (x == 1'b0 && y == 1'b0 && z == 1'b0) begin w <= 1'b1; end
    end
  end

endmodule
